---
title: "2025 Coffee Destinations"
author: "Shania JE Kimbrell"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r, echo = F, message = F, warning = F}
library(leaflet)
coffee <- leaflet () %>% addTiles() %>%
  setView(-89.4289304, 43.0560357, zoom = 10) %>%
  addMarkers(
    lat = 43.1296061,
    lng = -89.2950846, 
    label = "Broken Board Coffee: **Espresso Lemonade** / **Sweet Potato Latte**") %>%
  addMarkers(
    lat = 42.3125535,
    lng = -89.3597934, 
    label = "Rosie's Coffee: **Vanilla Latte**") %>%
  addMarkers(
    lat = 43.077353,
    lng = -89.3839609, 
    label = "Bradbury's Coffee: **Featured Cortado** / **Free Spro February**") %>%
  addMarkers(
    lat = 43.0682734,
    lng = -89.4235706, 
    label = "Cafe Domestique: **Featured Capp**") %>%
  addMarkers(
    lat = 43.0570066,
    lng = -89.4989154,
    label = "Qamaria Coffee Company: **Qamaria Latte**") %>%
  addMarkers(
    lat = 43.0530501,
    lng = -89.4353236,
    label = "Madison Chocolate Company: **Ghost Pepper Latte** / **Strawberry Matcha**") %>%
  addMarkers(
    lat = 25.77427,
    lng = -80.19366, 
    label = "Naughty Coffee: **Pour Over**") %>%
  addMarkers(
    lat = 25.77454,
    lng = -80.17088, 
    label = "Virgin Voyages: Intelligensia Coffee") %>%
  addMarkers(
    lat = 19.75,
    lng = -70.75, 
    label = "El Rincon Del Cafe & Chocolate RD Umbrella Street")

coffee
```
